provenance.prompt: photorealistic documentary photograph, overhead or elevated angle for clear visibility, even neutral lighting, no lens blur, no bokeh, sharp focus across the entire frame, no vignette, no artistic filter, flat graphic design wallpaper with a small loose grid of identical simple line-art bicycle icons on a pale grey background, generous spacing, plenty of empty background visible, black outline on white fill, no shadow, no gradient
provenance.negative_prompt: motion blur, soft focus, shallow depth of field, bokeh, lens flare, grainy film, stylized art, illustration, painting, cartoon, anime, watermark, text overlay, logo, signature, frame border, duplicate frame, split screen
